channel.title: Comments on: Coming to a TV near you…Beer America?
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: rudy
item.dc:creator: rudy
item.description: Great site guys. Keep up the good work and best of luck with the show!
item.content:encoded: Great site guys. Keep up the good work and best of luck with the show!

item.title: By: Gardner
item.dc:creator: Gardner
item.description: Awesome - best of luck - we are pooling for you
item.content:encoded: Awesome – best of luck – we are pooling for you

item.title: By: julie torrence
item.dc:creator: julie torrence
item.description: Wow, very cool Paul. Hope it works out.
item.content:encoded: Wow, very cool Paul. Hope it works out.

item.title: By: Kendra Eggleton
item.dc:creator: Kendra Eggleton
item.description: Good luck with the series, it will be a great addition to TV and we know many people will enjoy it. We miss Chris and Kathy at the beginning of the intro. We hope they will still be a feature! Keep up the good work, Best wishes, Kendra and Buddy
item.content:encoded: Good luck with the series, it will be a great addition to TV and we know many people will enjoy it. We miss Chris and Kathy at the beginning of the intro. We hope they will still be a feature! Keep up the good work, Best wishes, Kendra and Buddy

item.title: By: Travis
item.dc:creator: Travis
item.description: Wow, very cool guys. We're pulling for you here on the west coast.
item.content:encoded: Wow, very cool guys. We’re pulling for you here on the west coast.

item.title: By: Keith
item.dc:creator: Keith
item.description: Guys I just want to thank all of you, John,Paul,David and everyone else you have brought my attention to many beers that I never even knew existed. As a homebrewer I appreciate the wide variety of beers on the market today and can't wait to try and clone some of these great beers. Thanks for all yoo do for the craft beer industry and all of us out here who love the show. p.s. Paul, when I come to visit Savannah I will be expecting a tour :)
item.content:encoded:
Guys I just want to thank all of you, John,Paul,David and everyone else you have brought my attention to many beers that I never even knew existed. As a homebrewer I appreciate the wide variety of beers on the market today and can’t wait to try and clone some of these great beers. Thanks for all yoo do for the craft beer industry and all of us out here who love the show.
p.s. Paul, when I come to visit Savannah I will be expecting a tour 🙂

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
In reply to <a href="https://beeramerica.tv/coming-to-a-tv-near-you-beer-america/comment-page-1/#comment-470">BeerPancakes</a>.
Thanks for the comment BeerPancakes! If we are lucky enough to get a show on TV, it means this site gets better with a ton more content, more opportunity for people like you and everyone who visits this site to participate in a much bigger show! It's looking good, but nothing concrete just yet. We're getting calls, and that's a good thing!!
item.content:encoded:
In reply to BeerPancakes.

Thanks for the comment BeerPancakes! If we are lucky enough to get a show on TV, it means this site gets better with a ton more content, more opportunity for people like you and everyone who visits this site to participate in a much bigger show! It’s looking good, but nothing concrete just yet. We’re getting calls, and that’s a good thing!!

item.title: By: BeerPancakes
item.dc:creator: BeerPancakes
item.description: I enjoy the show and wish you guys luck in the future, but what does this mean for the internet version of the show? I don't get cable and I watch you guys (and other internet beer shows like it) online instead. Will you still post episodes online?
item.content:encoded: I enjoy the show and wish you guys luck in the future, but what does this mean for the internet version of the show? I don’t get cable and I watch you guys (and other internet beer shows like it) online instead. Will you still post episodes online?
